annotation: <Reasoning>Model interprets the movement literally and fails to make a creative connection to fictional setting where farmers move to imaginary land to solve their problems.</Reasoning>
<Reasoning>Model find the correct answer midway its reasoning, but continues to think more and concludes with a wrong answer.</Reasoning>
<Reasoning>Model makes up facts about referring to Al-Qaeda as Al-Kashi that sounds similar to the russian word for alcoholics.</Reasoning>
<Reasoning>Model locks into a certain quote from Michael Chabon and doesn't reevaluate its reasoning later.</Reasoning>
<Reasoning>Model connects the countries with a different link, but this link does not satisfy the other constraint that there used to be many more.</Reasoning>
<Reasoning>Model retrieves wrong facts/references about the entities in the question.</Reasoning>
<Reasoning>Model misinterpreted the word DEFINITIONS that was a clue to solving the puzzle.</Reasoning>
